headline: MOS Trades at 14x Earnings While Its Brazil Business Just Grew EBITDA 190% In Q3 2025
summary: Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) is trading near its 52-week low after shares fell about 14% over the past week and about 13% over the past month. The catalyst was a Q4 2025 net loss of $519.5 million, driven by surging sulfur costs and a $189 million impairment charge. Yet full-year 2025 net income came in at $540.7 ... MOS Trades at 14x Earnings While Its Brazil Business Just Grew EBITDA 190% In Q3 2025
